folio.label: 93v
folio.l: ¢ O noble Markys , ©oure humanyte
Assuretú vs , and ©euetú vs hardynesse
As ofte , as tyme is , of necessite
That we to ©ow mow telle , oure heuynesse
Acceptetú lord , thanne of ©oure gentilnesse
That if we , w pytous hert , vn to ©ow pleyne
And lete ©oure Eeres , nat my voys desdeyne
¢ Al haue I nat to done , in this matere
More than a nother man , hatú in this place
ñet for as meche , as ©e , my lord so deere
Han alwey shewed me , fauour and grace
I dar the betre , aske of ©ow a space
Of audience , to shewen oure request
And ©e my lord , to don rigút as ©ow list
¢ For certes lord , so wel vs lyketú ©ow
And alle ©oure werke , and euäe han don , that we
Ne coude nat , oure self , deuysen how
We mygúten lyuen , in more felicite
Saue o thyngö lord , if it ©owre wylle be
That for to be , a wedded man , ©ow list
Than were ©oure peeple , in souäayne hertis rest
¢ Bowetú ©oure nekke , vnder that blisseful ©ok
Of Souereyntee , nougút of seruyse
Whicú that men clepen , spousaile or wedlak
And thynketú lord , a mongö ©oure thougútes wyse
How that oure dayes , passe in sondry gyse
For thougú we slepe or wake , or rome or ryde
Ay fleetú the tyme , it wyl noman a byde
¢ And thougú ©oure grene ©outhe , floure as ©et
In crepetú age alwey , as stille as ston
And detú manacetú euäe age , and smyt
In ecú estate , for there eskapetú noon
And also certeyn , as we knowen echou~
That we shuln deye , and vncerteyne we alle
Ben of that day , whan detú shal on vs falle
¢ Acceptetú thanne of vs , the trewe entent
That neuäe ©et , refuseden ©oure heeste
And we wyln lord , if that ©e wyln assent
Chese ©ow a wyf , in short tyme at the leste
Born~ of the gentillest , and of the meste
Of al this lond , so that it ougút seme
Honour to god and ©ow , as we can deme
¢ Delyuäe vs out , of al this besi drede
And take a wyf , for heye goddis sake
For if it so byfel , as god for bede
That thurgú ©oure detú , ©oure lynage shuld slake
And that a straunge successour , shuld take
